description: Add Capacitor to enable native iOS and Android builds with offline support, native audio, and app store distribution

userStories.title: Install Capacitor core packages
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Capacitor installed in the project to enable native mobile builds.
acceptanceCriteria: Install @capacitor/core and @capacitor/cli as dependencies in frontend

userStories.title: Initialize Capacitor configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Capacitor configured with proper app metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: Run npx cap init with appId 'com.wodtimer.app' and appName 'AI WOD Timer'
Configure server.url for dev mode with proper localhost handling

userStories.title: Add iOS platform
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the iOS native project scaffolded.
acceptanceCriteria: Run npx cap add ios to create ios/ directory
Add ios/ to .gitignore with exceptions for config files

userStories.title: Add Android platform
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Android native project scaffolded.
acceptanceCriteria: Run npx cap add android to create android/ directory
Add android/ to .gitignore with exceptions for config files

userStories.title: Update Vite config for Capacitor compatibility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Vite configured to work properly with Capacitor.
acceptanceCriteria: Update vite.config.ts base to './' for relative asset paths
Ensure build output is compatible with Capacitor webview
Add build script that runs vite build && cap sync

userStories.title: Install and configure Capacitor Preferences plugin
userStories.description: As a user, I want my preferences persisted natively on mobile devices.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement get, set, remove methods matching localStorage API
Detect Capacitor native vs web and use appropriate storage

userStories.title: Install and configure Capacitor Haptics plugin
userStories.description: As a user, I want haptic feedback during workouts for better awareness.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement vibrate functions: light, medium, heavy, success, warning, error

userStories.title: Install and configure Capacitor KeepAwake plugin
userStories.description: As a user, I want the screen to stay on during active workouts.
acceptanceCriteria: Enable keep awake when timer is running, disable when paused/stopped

userStories.title: Integrate haptics into timer controls
userStories.description: As a user, I want haptic feedback when interacting with timer controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Add light haptic on play/pause button press
Add medium haptic on timer reset
Add success haptic on workout completion
Add warning haptic on final countdown (10, 5, 3, 2, 1)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Integrate keep awake into timer
userStories.description: As a user, I want my screen to stay on while workout is active.
acceptanceCriteria: Call keepAwake when timer starts playing
Call allowSleep when timer is paused, reset, or completed
Handle component unmount to ensure screen sleep is restored

userStories.title: Create Capacitor platform detection utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to detect the current platform for conditional logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/utils/platform.ts with platform detection functions
Export platform constant for reactive usage

userStories.title: Configure iOS safe area handling
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app to respect iOS notch and home indicator.
acceptanceCriteria: Update index.html with viewport-fit=cover meta tag
Apply env(safe-area-inset-*) CSS variables to layout components
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Configure Android back button handling
userStories.description: As a user, I want the Android back button to work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Listen for backButton event in App.vue
Navigate back in router if history exists
Show exit confirmation if on root route

userStories.title: Add Capacitor npm scripts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want convenient scripts to build and sync the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'build:mobile' script: 'npm run build && cap sync'

userStories.title: Document Capacitor build and deployment process
userStories.description: As a developer, I need documentation for building and deploying the mobile apps.
acceptanceCriteria: Document Android build process (requires Android Studio)
Document signing and release build instructions
Include troubleshooting section for common issues
